reviews.comment:
De todo lo que ofrecen como comida elaborada, tienen solo el 10% mas de 20 minutos esperando 2 hamburguesas chicas y no habia gente pidiendo comida como para q sea una demora razonable.
Para cargar combustible y seguir esta bien. Para el resto, hay q ponerle onda xq las papafritas eran una mi$#$da

(Translated by Google)
Of all the prepared food they offer, only 10% have a wait time of over 20 minutes for two small burgers, and there weren't many people ordering food for it to be a reasonable delay.
It's fine to fill up on gas and keep going. For the rest, you have to get moving because the fries were crap.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCdWFTYWJBEAE

reviews.comment:
El Full muuuuy pobre. De las 15 opciones para comer exhibidas en los afiches, solo tenían hamburguesas simples, dobles y papas fritas. No había opciones para quien no come carne. Tampoco tenían mayonesa ni ketchup, hamburguesas sin lechuga, sin tomate, sin mayonesa y sin ketchup: una delicia.

(Translated by Google)
The Full menu was very poor. Of the 15 food options advertised, they only had single and double hamburgers and fries. There were no options for vegetarians. They also didn't have mayonnaise or ketchup; the hamburgers were without lettuce, tomato, mayonnaise, or ketchup: a delight.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCbWRXRXVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Antes de comenzar a cargarle combustible a los clientes, deberían informar sobre los problemas técnicos que puedan tener. Estuve el 21/12/22 cargué nafta y no les amdaban los sistemas para pagar con tarjeta y/o con la app. Solo efectivo  y la factura hecha en forma manual sin carga de puntos en serviclub.

(Translated by Google)
Before they start refueling customers, they should inform them about any technical problems they might be having. I was there on December 21, 2022, and I filled up with gas, and their systems weren't working for card payments or the app. They were only accepting cash, and the receipt was generated manually without any points being credited to my Serviclub account.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCbG9LNE5BEAE
